tools.name: list_expenses
tools.description: List reimbursement records with optional filters, paging, and safe sorting.

tools.name: get_expense_detail
tools.description: Return one reimbursement record with linked invoice, employee, department, and approvals.

tools.name: find_invoice_usage
tools.description: Find reimbursement records that use a given invoice number.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoice facts with usage counts and linked reimbursement record IDs.

tools.name: find_reused_invoices
tools.description: List invoices used by at least min_usage_count reimbursement records.

tools.name: summarize_expenses
tools.description: Summarize reimbursement records by safe dimensions such as department, employee, type, or month.

group_by.description: Comma-separated safe dimensions: employee_id, department_id, expense_type, city_tier, status, budget_year, month.

tools.name: summarize_department_budgets
tools.description: Return all departments with annual budget, used amount, remaining amount, and usage rate.

tools.name: list_records_by_reimburse_delay
tools.description: List reimbursement records ordered by days between expense_date and reimburse_date.

tools.name: list_records_missing_approval
tools.description: List records that do not have an approval row for the required approver role.

tools.name: list_employees
tools.description: List employees, optionally filtered by department.

tools.name: get_employee
tools.description: Return one employee with level, department, role, and hire date.

tools.name: get_department_budget
tools.description: Return one department budget and approved reimbursement cumulative amount.

tools.name: list_approvals
tools.description: List approval chain rows for one reimbursement record.
